llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Deputy Manager, Business Development
job.description: We are looking for a dynamic and commercially driven Deputy Manager – Business Development to lead market expansion, customer engagement, and product development initiatives in Bangladesh’s vegetable seeds business. This role is ideal for professionals passionate about agriculture, sales strategy, dealer development, and building long-term partnerships across the agri-value chain. Key Responsibilities Sales Business Growth Drive annual sales targets and market share growth Develop and execute regional business plans aligned with company goals Build strong relationships with distributors, dealers, retailers, and growers Expand retail/dealer networks and increase channel penetration Execute promotional campaigns and grow customer loyalty Product Market Development Conduct field trials and demonstrations for focused crops Support successful launch and commercialization of new varieties Identify market opportunities and customer needs Collaborate with teams on crop development and promotional activities Train growers on advanced cultivation practices and product usage Financial Operational Management Manage receivables and ensure smooth credit management Monitor key financial and sales metrics Support regulatory liaison activities including product registration and seed licensing What We’re Looking For Bachelor’s degree in Agriculture 6–8 years of experience in a similar role Experience working with an MNC is preferred Strong skills in sales, business development, and marketing Fluent in English and local language Strong commercial mindset, customer focus, collaboration, and relationship-building skills Key Success Indicators Sales target achievement Market share growth Dealer satisfaction and expansion Sustainable customer relationships Accuracy of sales planning and market insights Working Environment Frequent travel Collaboration with distributors, retailers, and cross-functional teams Opportunity to work closely with regional stakeholders 📍 Location: Bangladesh 🌍 Industry: Agriculture / Vegetable Seeds 💼 Function: Sales Business Development If you are passionate about transforming agriculture through innovation and strong market leadership, we would encourage you to apply online for this position.
